headline: Trane Technologies Exceeds DOE Heating Capacity Requirements in Commercial Building HVAC Technology Challenge
summary: SWORDS, IE / ACCESS Newswire / March 24, 2026 / Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today announced it has successfully completed all required laboratory testing for both its rooftop units (RTUs) in the 10-14 and 15-25 ton capacity ...

headline: Britain responds to Iran war energy shock by requiring solar panels and heat pumps in all new homes
summary: The move comes as part of Britain's response to the Iran war, with the conflict triggering the largest supply disruption in the history of the oil market.

headline: Trane Technologies, ATI, Comfort Systems, Stratasys, and Oshkosh Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the Trump administration postponed military action against Iran's following 'very good and productive' talks.
